flashcards.front: How are ANNs used in computer vision?
flashcards.back: Image classification (CNNs identify objects in images), object detection (locating objects in images), facial recognition, image segmentation, and medical image analysis (tumor detection in X-rays/MRIs).

flashcards.front: How are ANNs applied in Natural Language Processing?
flashcards.back: Machine translation (Google Translate), text generation (GPT), sentiment analysis, chatbots, speech recognition (Siri, Alexa), and named entity recognition.

flashcards.front: What are ANN applications in healthcare?
flashcards.back: Medical image diagnosis (detecting tumors, fractures), drug discovery (predicting molecular interactions), patient outcome prediction, genomic analysis, and personalized treatment recommendations.

flashcards.front: How are ANNs used in autonomous vehicles?
flashcards.back: Object detection and recognition, lane detection, traffic sign recognition, pedestrian detection, path planning, and sensor data fusion from cameras, LiDAR, and radar.

flashcards.front: What are ANN applications in finance?
flashcards.back: Fraud detection (anomaly identification in transactions), algorithmic trading, credit risk assessment, stock price prediction, and portfolio optimization.

flashcards.front: How are ANNs used in gaming and entertainment?
flashcards.back: Game AI (AlphaGo, chess engines), procedural content generation, NPC behavior, realistic graphics rendering, and player behavior modeling.

flashcards.front: What are ANN applications in speech and audio?
flashcards.back: Speech recognition (converting speech to text), text-to-speech synthesis, music generation, speaker identification, and noise cancellation.

flashcards.front: How are ANNs applied in manufacturing?
flashcards.back: Predictive maintenance, quality control through visual inspection, process optimization, supply chain management, and robotic control.

flashcards.front: What are ANN applications in recommendation systems?
flashcards.back: Product recommendations (Amazon), content suggestions (Netflix, YouTube), music recommendations (Spotify), using collaborative and content-based filtering with deep learning.

flashcards.front: What role do ANNs play in cybersecurity?
flashcards.back: Intrusion detection systems, malware classification, network traffic anomaly detection, phishing email detection, and user behavior analytics for threat identification.
